memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garrett Family in England.pdf
memoryArtifacts.description: This extensive research appears to have been completed by John E. Garrett Jr. who also provided the Garrett Family Genealogy attached in several of the same records. Everyone in this document is not yet tagged. Link - https://www.yumpu.com/en/document/read/20936828/the-garretts-in-england-garrett-family-genealogy

zh.Old Romney Kent England: 英國英格蘭肯特笛卡爾 羅姆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Garrard於1518年之前出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親John Garrard41歲，母親Agnes Epes35歲。他和Isabella Nethermill至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他於1557年在英國倫敦被列為member of parliament for london。他去世於1571年9月27日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Garrard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Garrard was born before 1518, in London, England, his father, John Garrard, was 41 and his mother, Agnes Epes, was 35. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Isabella Nethermill. In 1557, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for london in London, England. He died on 27 September 1571, in his hometown, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Garrard est né avant 1518, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John Garrard, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes Epes, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Isabella Nethermill. En 1557, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for london à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1571, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

Er hatte mit Isabella Nethermill mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1557 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament for london in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. September 1571 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in London, England begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Isabella Nethermill. Nel 1557, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for london nel London, England. Morì il 27 settembre 1571, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Garrardが1518年以前にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Garrardは41歳，母Agnes Epesは35歳であった。彼はIsabella Nethermillとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1557年，イギリスロンドンでの職業はmember of parliament for londonと記録されている。彼は1571年9月27日に故郷で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Garrard(이)가 1518년 이전 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Garrard(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Epes(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Isabella Nethermill(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1557년, 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 member of parliament for london이었다. 그는 1571년 9월 27일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Garrard nasceu antes 1518, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Garrard, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Epes, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Isabella Nethermill. Em 1557, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for london em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1571, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Garrard родился перед 1518 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Garrard было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Epes, 35. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Isabella Nethermill. В 1557 году он работал по профессии member of parliament for london в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 27 сентября 1571 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.
